diagrams.name: user_registration_and_authentication
diagrams.title: User Registration & Authentication
diagrams.description: Steps for registering a new user, checking existing registration, validating credentials, and retrieving user details
diagrams.scope: User account management — registration through login

diagrams.name: product_catalogue_management
diagrams.title: Product Catalogue Management
diagrams.description: Admin and system activities for adding, updating, removing, searching, and retrieving product details and images

diagrams.name: shopping_cart_flow
diagrams.title: Shopping Cart Flow
diagrams.description: Customer activities for managing cart items: adding, updating quantity, removing products, and viewing cart contents
diagrams.scope: Cart management — item addition through checkout preparation

diagrams.name: order_processing_and_payment
diagrams.title: Order Processing & Payment
diagrams.description: End-to-end order workflow: placing an order, recording the transaction, handling payment success, and shipping
diagrams.scope: Order fulfilment pipeline — checkout to shipment

diagrams.name: product_demand_tracking
diagrams.title: Product Demand Tracking
diagrams.description: Activity flow for recording customer demand for out-of-stock or unavailable products and checking demand status
diagrams.scope: Demand management — customer demand registration and lookup
